description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that inherits the project's default tags, retry policy, cache, before_script and runs only on code changes. Add a memory-on-boot job (default stage) that uses the .use-pg-10 extension (PostgreSQL 10 service), sets NODE_ENV, NODE_OPTIONS, RAILS_ENV, SETUP_DB='true' and SKIP_STORAGE_VALIDATION='true', and executes `ENABLE_BOOTSNAP=false PATH_TO_HIT="/users/sign_in" CUT_OFF=0.3 bundle exec derailed exec perf:mem >> tmp/memory_on_boot.txt` followed by `scripts/generate-memory-metrics-on-boot tmp/memory_on_boot.txt >> tmp/memory_on_boot_metrics.txt`; it stores tmp/memory_*.txt as artifacts and publishes tmp/memory_on_boot_metrics.txt as a metrics report. Add a memory-static job (default stage) that sets SETUP_DB='false' and runs `bundle exec derailed bundle:mem > tmp/memory_bundle_mem.txt`, `scripts/generate-gems-size-metrics-static tmp/memory_bundle_mem.txt >> tmp/memory_metrics.txt`, `bundle exec derailed bundle:objects > tmp/memory_bundle_objects.txt`, and `scripts/generate-gems-memory-metrics-static tmp/memory_bundle_objects.txt >> tmp/memory_metrics.txt`; it also stores tmp/memory_*.txt as artifacts and publishes tmp/memory_metrics.txt as a metrics report.
